name: electrolux-to-mqtt-telemetry-backend
description: Aptabase-backed telemetry backend: serves SVG badges (in-memory) + receives legacy /telemetry POSTs

scripts.dev:docker: NODE_VERSION=$(cat ../.nvmrc) docker compose down ; NODE_VERSION=$(cat ../.nvmrc) docker compose up --build

author: Kimmo Saari <kirbo@kirbo-designs.com>
